name_en: Sajjad Moghadam Sati Sofi Evad Sheikhzadeh
name_fa: سجاد مقدم ساتی صوفی اواد شیخ‌زاده
aliases: Sheikhzadeh Sajjad Moghadam Sati Sofi Evad
role: Iranian national; wanted in connection with the 2026 Baku IRGC assassination and bombing plots
bio: Sajjad Moghadam Sati Sofi Evad Sheikhzadeh is an Iranian national placed on an international wanted list by Azerbaijan's State Security Service (DTX) in March 2026 in connection with the [2026 IRGC terror plot in Azerbaijan](/events/azerbaijan-irgc-terror-plot-foiled-2026). According to Azerbaijani authorities, Sheikhzadeh offered $50,000 to anyone willing to place an explosive device under a bridge in the Sangachal settlement of Baku's Garadagh district. Investigators established that he had received special directives from the [Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) (IRGC/SEPAH) to prepare assassination plots against individuals of Jewish origin residing in Azerbaijan. An international arrest warrant was issued for Sheikhzadeh for involvement in organizing terror, sabotage, and assassination acts aimed at destabilizing Azerbaijan.

sources.title: State Security Service foils IRGC terror plots in Azerbaijan
State Security Service exposes IRGC terror plans in Azerbaijan
A unique operation by DTX: SEPAH intended to bomb these areas in Baku

editorial_notes: Named on international wanted list March 2026. Received IRGC directives targeting Jewish community in Azerbaijan. Offered financial reward for bridge bombing in Garadagh district.
